text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
My chest feels hot... My heart's pounding, and I
feel so powerful...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
They say the statue of the Three Goddesses holds
the wishes of racers...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I wonder if this is the power of those wishes...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...All right, I'm going to run even more!
